name: zeno-ui
description: Workspace for the Zeno UI packages.

scripts.build:packages: yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tokens build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/animations build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-engine build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tailwind-preset build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/nativewind-preset build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-runtime build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react build && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react-native build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @zeno-ui/animations typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/nativewind-preset typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/react-native typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tailwind-preset typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-engine typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/theme-runtime typecheck && yarn workspace @zeno-ui/tokens typecheck
scripts.pack:packages: yarn build:packages && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/tokens && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/animations && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/theme-engine && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/tailwind-preset && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/nativewind-preset && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/theme-runtime && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/react && npm --cache .npm-cache pack --dry-run ./packages/react-native
scripts.publish:packages:built: npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/tokens --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/animations --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/theme-engine --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/tailwind-preset --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/nativewind-preset --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/theme-runtime --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/react --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm --cache .npm-cache publish ./packages/react-native --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/
